Motion To Compel Discovery Responses; Separate Statement
Off Calendar Aug-15-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Donal E. Krentsa for plaintiff and moving party: Jon Hepper
Hugh A. Levine for defendant and opposing party: Lei Liddel

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification: Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories is granted as to form interrogatory 2.6(a). The motion is denied as to the other requests. The court further orders that defendant Lei Liddell is barred from giving testimony at trial, except to assert the Fifth Amendment, until and unless he makes himself available for deposition and serves verified responses to written discovery.

MODIFICATION: Strike portion of Order relating to future discovery.
COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
